title: taraxacum fulvum
intro: Taraxacum fulvum, also known as the yellow dandelion or yellow hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of flavonoids, sesquiterpenes, and phenolic acids. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and inflammation, thanks to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. Taraxacum fulvum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote liver health, reduce blood pressure, and boost the immune system.
